version_notes: v1.0.0 is the job-hunter family tracker member, carved from the v5.2.0 monolith's Phase 4 (prepare-for-submission / application tracker) + Phase 4.5 (stale-application follow-ups + thank-you notes). Owns generate_tracker_html.py (bundles assets/templates/tracker.css; CSS lives in the asset, never inline) and draft_followup.py (check_in / thank_you drafting + scan-stale). Two load-bearing safety invariants: the tracker CSS is sourced from the asset file (no inline drift), and follow-up staleness reads ONLY applied_date never posted (the v5.1.1 fix), and the drafter NEVER auto-sends (no SMTP/email imports). Reads postings.json + tailored-resume filenames; produces tracker.json -> ApplicationTracker.html per the family workspace-contract.
